name: Fleet Complete Telematics API
what_it_does: Fleet Complete REST API for fleet management and telematics platform. Enables AI agents to manage real-time vehicle GPS location and movement tracking for fleet visibility, handle ELD (Electronic Logging Device) compliance and HOS (Hours of Service) data retrieval, access driver behavior scoring and safety event data for fleet safety programs, retrieve asset tracking and equipment location data for asset management, manage field service work order and job dispatch integration, handle maintenance alert and service reminder data for fleet maintenance, access fuel consumption and idle time analytics for efficiency optimization, retrieve vehicle inspection (DVIR) and defect report data for compliance, manage geofence event and alert data for operational awareness, and integrate fleet data with dispatch, routing, and enterprise management systems.
use_cases: Tracking vehicle locations from fleet operations agents
Monitoring HOS compliance from driver safety agents
Dispatching field service jobs from work order automation agents
Analyzing fuel efficiency from fleet cost management agents
not_for: Personal vehicle tracking without commercial fleet management context
Enterprise TMS without last-mile and field service fleet focus
Consumer navigation without commercial fleet operations and compliance
best_when: A commercial fleet operator or field service company using Fleet Complete wants AI agents to automate vehicle tracking, HOS compliance monitoring, driver safety scoring, dispatch optimization, and fleet maintenance management.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Vehicle tracking data reveals driver location and movement patterns — automated collection and analysis must comply with driver privacy agreements and applicable state laws (e.g., California AB 5). COMPLIANCE RISK: ELD and HOS data interpretation for regulatory compliance requires certified fleet compliance manager review; automated HOS violation determination without review can generate false violations.

auth.notes: Fleet Complete uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-account credentials. Developer portal at developer.fleetcomplete.com. Webhooks for fleet events. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Ontario HQ. Fleet Complete acquired by Bell (2020). Focus on SMB fleets and field service. ELD certified for US and Canada compliance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription per vehicle
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-vehicle monthly subscription; asset tracking and field service add-ons
pricing.notes: Toronto, Ontario. Founded 2000. Acquired by Bell Canada (2020). Fleet management and telematics market. 60,000+ customers. SMB fleet focus with field service integration. ELD certified for US (FMCSA) and Canada (Transport Canada). Competes with Samsara and Geotab for fleet telematics market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Driver location tracking must comply with driver privacy agreements and applicable state laws; automated monitoring programs require HR and legal policy review
HOS interpretation — automated HOS violation detection requires certified fleet compliance specialist review; Hours of Service rules are complex (property carrier vs. passenger carrier, exemptions)
ELD data integrity — ELD data has FMCSA tamper-detection requirements; automated ELD data processing must preserve audit trail and not modify certified records

Field service job dispatch — automated job dispatch must account for driver HOS availability, vehicle capacity, and geographic proximity; dispatch without constraint checking creates compliance issues
Canadian vs. US HOS rules — Fleet Complete covers both US (FMCSA) and Canadian (Transport Canada) HOS regulations; verify jurisdiction-specific rule application for multi-country fleets
Bell Canada acquisition — Fleet Complete acquired by Bell (2020); product integration with Bell IoT platform ongoing; API stability during integration period
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fleet telematics and ELD compliance. SOC2, FMCSA-ELD. OAuth2/API key. US/CA. Vehicle location and driver data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fleet management and ELD. SOC2, FMCSA. OAuth2. US/CA. Vehicle location and HOS data.
